CONCEPT_A_BODY: One street, locked frames, patient blocking. Kilo walks the same hundred meters while the city resets around him. The wrongness compounds pass by pass.
CONCEPT_B_BODY: The night's own cameras take over. Security angles, dash cams, a stranger's vertical. The song assembles itself out of what got recorded.
QUOTE_BODY: Tight on face under the flickering lamp. Kilo turns to camera for the first time all night. The drop lands on the cut to black.
KEY_01_LBL: C3 · PASS THREE → BLACK · DROP HIT · 85MM
KEY_02_LBL: C4 · SECURITY CAM · TIMESTAMP BURN-IN · WIDE
GRADE_LEDE: Two grades, one night. The loop holds a clean neutral so the frame reads honest; the leak block inherits whatever its source camera does to color.
LIGHT_A_BODY: Available sodium plus one hidden bounce. Locked white balance across passes; the frame never changes, only the world inside it.
LIGHT_B_BODY: Source-accurate. Fluorescents, headlights, phone torches. No movie lights in leak frames.
VFX_NOTE: Minimal. Timestamp burn-ins, one split-diopter, speed ramps on the climax reel only. No comped elements.
BEAT_01_VISUAL: Black. Title card. Streetlight flickers on.
BEAT_02_VISUAL: Three passes of Frame Street, wrongness compounding.
BEAT_03_VISUAL: Hard cut to the security-cam angle, timestamp burning in.
BEAT_04_VISUAL: Found-footage chain: dash cam, phone vertical, ATM cam.
BEAT_05_VISUAL: The loop street, empty now. Title card.
